acceptance.assertion: Workspace and task store derive the same digest from one canonical argv serialization.
Any argv or serialization drift is detected before writer execution.
Existing receipts are handled through an explicit versioned compatibility policy.

goal: Use one canonical argv_sha256 algorithm across Workspace, durable task store and receipts.

metadata.reason: The formal Agent Workspace path remained degraded while the isolated read-only Claude packet review succeeded through the direct review adapter.

title: Unify Agent Workspace argv digest binding
